meta.notes: Required env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY (service role), ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PUSH_LAMBDA_URL. Requires tables: child_profiles, story_sessions, child_dynamic_context, morning_reactions, notification_preferences, weekly_briefs. Minimum 3 sessions required to generate brief. Cron fires Sundays 8pm UTC.
